title: Human Resource (HR) & Admin Officer
description:
Company: De Beaute Beauty & Slimming

We are a dynamic and growing organization in the Beauty, Slimming, and Spa Wellness industry, committed to fostering a positive work environment and supporting our  company's team's professional growth.

Work Type: Flexible hours – Part-time or Full-time available 

Salary: SGD 2,500 – SGD 3,500 per month (depending on experience and qualifications)

Key Responsibilities:
- Manage end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes
- Maintain employee records and HR databases
- Handle payroll, attendance, and leave management
- Support the implementation of HR policies and procedures, including compliance with Singapore government laws.
- Organize and coordinate administrative activities
- Assist in employee engagement and welfare activities
- Able to relate and communicate with employees on company rules and  regulations
- Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies
- Provide general administrative support to management

Requirements:
- Must have experience in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
- Previous experience in HR and/or Admin roles preferred
- Strong organizational and multitasking skills
- Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities
- Proficient in MS Office and HR management systems
- Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Benefits:
- Flexible working hours
- Option to work part-time or full-time
- Supportive and inclusive work culture
- Opportunities for career growth

Interested candidates, please contact us via WhatsApp at 8133 3030. Initial interviews will be conducted via video call, followed by an in-person office interview.

postedCompany.description:
DE BEAUTE BEAUTY & SLIMMING PTE. LTD.

 

De Beaute has been established since September 2001. De Beaute aims to provide Beauty and Wellness services and solutions to pamper the modern women today. Our services are all designed and tailored for all women of all levels of professionalism, such that we could assist our prestigious customers in achieving the body they deserve, in the most effective and efficient manner. Within less than 3 years of operations, we already have 4 operating outlets located out at various parts of Singapore for our customers' convenience.

The teams behind De Beaute are all experienced Beauty Professional who hold International Beauty Certifications and had global exposures in countries such as United States of America, Spain and Hong Kong. They attend various International Beauty Exhibitions and Seminars, thus providing them with the opportunities to review most of the latest beauty treatment products and equipments first hand.
postedCompany.name: DE BEAUTE BEAUTY & SLIMMING PTE. LTD.
